task.title: Split CodeWiki skills into focused outer and inner workflows
task.summary: Replace the single monolithic CodeWiki skill with a package-level router plus focused CodeWiki skills for planning, task execution, research, and verification.

goal.outcome: Agents load only the CodeWiki workflow instructions needed for the current job while preserving shared CodeWiki invariants.
acceptance: A small `codewiki` router skill states package invariants and when to load each focused skill.
Skill descriptions are precise enough for Pi progressive disclosure and do not duplicate large workflow text.
All focused skills preserve `.wiki/knowledge` as canonical intent and roadmap/evidence as machine-managed operational truth.
non_goals: Install unrelated global skills as part of this repo task.
Replace CodeWiki tools or roadmap schema.
verification: Run package typecheck/tests after skill/package changes.
Use Pi startup or package listing to confirm focused skills are discoverable.
Review each skill for overlap and conflicting instructions.

delta.desired: CodeWiki package exposes composable workflow skills optimized for planning, execution, research, and verification.
delta.current: One CodeWiki skill contains all guidance and is growing into a monolith.
delta.closure: Split skill files and keep a compact router/invariants skill.

acceptance_matrix.criterion: A small `codewiki` router skill states package invariants and when to load each focused skill.
checks: Run package typecheck/tests after skill/package changes.
